description: Bootstrap a minimal .NET console app repo
prompt: Bootstrap AI infrastructure for this repo

description: Bootstrap an ASP.NET Web API with xUnit tests
prompt: Set up AI development environment for this ASP.NET API repo
expected_behavior: Detects xUnit test framework from NuGet references
Creates run-tests skill with correct test project paths
Creates copilot-setup-steps.yml with dotnet restore + build
Detects GitHub Actions CI and configures pr-build-status for GH Actions

prompt: Bootstrap AI infrastructure for this MAUI repo
expected_behavior: Creates platform-scoped instructions for Android and iOS
Detects multiple test projects (unit, device, UI tests)
Configures pr-build-status for Azure DevOps (if eng/ pipeline found)

description: Repo that already has partial AI setup
prompt: Onboard AI features for this repo
expected_behavior: Asks user before overwriting or merging

description: Repo using Azure DevOps for CI (not GitHub Actions)
expected_behavior: Configures pr-build-status with Azure DevOps API commands
